name: 5 nights at Timokha 4: School
short_description: Continuation of the legendary saga about the naughty Timokha and his delicious pie!
detailed_description:
NEW ADVENTURES!

September 1st. Naughty Timokha burst into the assembly and ruined the holiday of knowledge! All the children ran away and only a team of brave avengers is ready to challenge real evil! Druzhban, Ded and Maloy united to fight back the enemies! In this game, you will have to survive 5 exciting days and nights, playing for different heroes and completing various quest tasks during the allotted time! Collect objects, solve the mysteries of the "Tasty Pie" school, survive! Only the chosen ones will be able to survive this terrible nightmare!

THIS TIME EVERYTHING IS VERY SERIOUS!

The team of villains was joined by an impudent mathematician - Tamara Pirozhkova, who will teach you how to divide a sine by a cosine! You will also be confronted by Petrovich! His weapon will be a tough ZIL, which will fire beef at our friends!

You will have an unforgettable game that will give you a lot of joy, laughter and fear at the same time!
